temporal_description: In a dimly lit indoor setting, two men stand facing each other in a tense conversation. The man on the left, wearing a light blue, short-sleeved button-down shirt and dark trousers, gestures with his left hand near his face as he speaks. The man on the right, dressed in a dark suit, listens intently. The background is dark and appears to be an office or a stairwell, with the faint outlines of bookshelves and a whiteboard visible. In the upper left corner of the screen, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the two men. A man speaks in a slightly weary and apologetic tone, saying, "这么晚来找你啊" (I came to find you so late). Another man replies with a calm and professional voice, "黄警官" (Officer Huang). The first man continues, his voice becoming more serious and cautionary, as if sharing confidential information, "你知道啊，这样的事情要保密的" (You know, things like this need to be kept confidential). The second man responds with a reassuring and calm tone, "没关系" (It's okay). The background is quiet, with no music or significant sound effects, focusing the listener's attention entirely on the private conversation.
